name: CadenzaDB
description: This is the official CadenzaDB database service. It is used to store metadata and execution data from the Cadenza framework.

name: ScheduledRunnerService
description: Mocks IoT device events and triggers monitoring flows

name: TelemetryCollectorService
description: Ingests and validates IoT telemetry, fan-out to anomaly detection

name: AnomalyDetectorService
description: Detects outliers in IoT telemetry using statistical analysis

name: PredictorService
description: Forecasts IoT device failures using anomalies and external weather data
